---
title: "Elizabeth Charles"
---

## Elizabeth Charles

**Dates:** (1828–1896)

**Maiden name:** (Rundle)

### Description

novelist

### Biography

Her novels were published under the name Mrs Rundle Charles.

### Letters

- Letter from June 10th 1889
- Letter from Oct 15th [1885?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
